channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Harris goes to North Carolina, plans to hold Sunday campaign event in state hit hard by hurricane
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris is meeting with Black leaders in North Carolina and will attend church in the state ahead of a rally.
item.dc:creator: Josh Boak, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Hunting for male voters: Walz steps into the field for the pheasant opener
item.description: Gov. Tim Walz had more pheasant hunting companions than usual for this year’s opener near Sleepy Eye, on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Ben Hovland and The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Harris-Walz campaign targets hunters, fishermen for support
item.description: The Harris-Walz campaign launched a new coalition designed to draw voter support from outdoorsmen in swing states
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Chicago spent $80K to renovate office for first lady Johnson as city faces billion dollar budget shortfall
item.description: Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson is facing scrutiny after the city spent $80,000 to renovate an office for first lady Stacie Johnson while facing a nearly billion-dollar budget shortfall.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Doctor deems Harris in 'excellent health.' Her team aims to contrast with Trump's scant medical info
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Vice President Kamala Harris is in “excellent health” and “possesses the physical and mental resiliency” required to serve as president, her doctor said in a letter released Saturday that summarizes her medical history and status. Dr.
item.dc:creator: DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump holds rare rally in California, with eye on keeping House majority
item.description: Former President Trump is holding a rare rally in California this weekend as the state is expected to play a central role in the fight for control of the House.
item.dc:creator: Hanna Trudo, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: New York gun control regime handed defeat in court
item.description: A federal judge in New York struck down a state ban on carrying concealed firearms on all private property, reasoning it is unconstitutional under Supreme Court precedent.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ted Cruz and Colin Allred wage another big US Senate fight in Texas
item.description: FORT WORTH, Texas (AP) — Attack ads on every TV break. Campaign money pouring in. And on a sunny Saturday, a crowd stretching out the door for a campaign rally at Tulip's, a popular Fort Worth nightclub — this time for Democratic U.S. Rep.
item.dc:creator: SEAN MURPHY and JUAN A. LOZANO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fight for House raging in districts ringing NYC where Trump struggled but other Republicans thrived
item.description: NELSONVILLE, N.Y. (AP) — Voters in a ring of congressional districts encircling New York City where Republican candidates often do well but Donald Trump struggled in 2020 could decide which party controls the U.S. House for the next two years.
item.dc:creator: ANTHONY IZAGUIRRE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Democrats, civil rights groups push to extend voter registration in swing states battered by hurricanes
item.description: Voting rights groups were denied motions to extend the voter registration deadline in various swing states battered by Hurricanes Helene and Milton.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Why Trump is headed into 'the belly of the beast': The strategy behind his blue state stops
item.description: With less than four weeks to go until Election Day in his margin-of-error race with Vice President Kamala Harris, why is former President Trump campaigning in blue states?
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Data shows migrants aren’t taking jobs from Black or Hispanic people, despite what Trump says
item.description: Republican presidential nominee Donald Trump promises the biggest deportation event the U.S. has ever seen if he is elected.
item.dc:creator: Fatima Hussein, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: No Dem effort to stymie Trump election win certification: Strategists
item.description: A few Democratic lawmakers say they will accept a free and fair Trump election win, but aren't sure he'll be fair or honest.
item.dc:creator: Rich Johnson, NewsNation

item.title: Comer slams Raskin over his election certification comments: 'Ultimate hypocrite'
item.description: House Oversight Chairman James Comer (R-Ky.) condemned comments from Rep. Jamie Raskin (D-Md.), calling him “the ultimate hypocrite” after the Democrat claimed former President Trump is trying to manipulate the electoral college.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, NewsNation

item.title: Trump campaign seeks increased security as election draws near, including military aircraft amid Iran threats
item.description: President Biden on Friday said he will grant the Trump campaign the extra security is it requesting as he continues to campaign for the presidency.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Walz returns to Mankato to reprise role as coach, deliver football pep talk and campaign a little
item.description: The governor stopped through on a campaign visit marking the 25th anniversary of the season the Mankato West football team won the state championship with him as assistant coach. He will attend the Governors Pheasant opener in Sleepy Eye Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Hannah Yang, MPR News

item.title: Trump's campaign requests military aircraft and armored vehicles in response to threats from Iran
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Donald Trump 's aides have requested a slew of stepped-up security measures, including military aircraft capable of shooting down surface-to-air missiles to transport the former president in the race’s final stretch, amid growing concerns over threats from Iran in a campaign already
item.dc:creator: JILL COLVIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Are male voters reluctant to vote for a woman? Harris' backers are confronting the question head on
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The concern has been there all along, but now it's being talked about openly: Are some men reluctant to vote for Democrat Kamala Harris because she’s a woman? The vice president rarely references her gender on the campaign trail, but her key supporters are starting to make more dir
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT and ZEKE MILLER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NYC pursuing thousands of hotel rooms to house migrants amid multibillion-dollar costs: report
item.description: The city of New York needs 14,000 beds for migrants next year, according to a report, as the city continues to grapple with the migrant crisis.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: US sees a window for a new push to break political deadlock in Lebanon to ease conflict
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — With Israel’s sabotage and military operations in Lebanon taking out many of Hezbollah’s senior leaders, some in Washington and elsewhere believe there may be a window for a new push to break the political deadlock in Lebanon to try to ease escalating war.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW LEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Top Republican demands answers as billions in FEMA relief are still going to COVID: 'Legitimate concern'
item.description: Rep. Chip Roy, R-Texas, sent a scathing letter to FEMA chief Deanne Criswell demanding answers on disaster relief immediate-use funding going to COVID concerns.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pat Ryan, Alison Esposito face off in NY-18 debate on PIX11
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Democratic U.S. Rep. Pat Ryan and Republican Alison Esposito, the two candidates running to represent New York's 18th Congressional District, faced off in a debate on PIX11 Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Ben Mitchell, NewsNation

item.title: Melania Trump waves off 'hand-swatting incident': A 'mere misunderstanding'
item.description: Melania Trump is waving off speculation that she didn't want to hold her husband's hand, chalking up images of her seemingly "swatting" away former President Donald Trump to a "mere misunderstanding.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, Fox 5

item.title: Trump campaign blasts Bob Woodward; denies secret Putin calls
item.description: Donald Trump's campaign is rejecting claims in Bob Woodward's new book 'War' about the former president holding secret calls with Vladimir Putin since leaving office.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, Fox 5

item.title: U.S. Treasury says tribally owned entities should be tax-exempt
item.description: Proposed new guidelines would clarify the decades-old question of whether tribal businesses or entities are exempt from federal taxes.
item.dc:creator: MPR News

item.title: Poll: In the midst of a tight presidential race, Trump draws support from voters disillusioned with democracy
item.description: New polling shows this year’s Harris v. Trump presidential race is too close to call, with Trump drawing support from voters who are disillusioned with democracy. Results from the McCourtney Institute for Democracy’s Sept. 23-27, 2024 Mood of the Nation Poll.
item.dc:creator: Eric Plutzer and Craig Helmstetter, MPR News

item.title: Harris is pressed for more specifics in a wide-ranging interview with '60 Minutes'
item.description: The interview followed criticism from former President Donald Trump that Kamala Harris has been unwilling to sit for hard interviews. She was pressed on everything from her economic proposals to immigration.
item.dc:creator: NPR Washington Desk, MPR News

item.title: Michael Naft discusses traffic safety, F1, and animal welfare in the Las Vegas valley
item.description: Michael Naft, incumbent county commissioner for District 8, joined Brian Loftis on the 8 News Now Daily Voting Guide Monday, discussing his campaign priorities as election day nears.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Pro-Trump Christian nationalists are on tour to recruit election workers
item.description: “Are you guys ready to show the world that Christians will be silent no more?” said one speaker, whose nonprofit is recruiting people to become election workers.
item.dc:creator: Lisa Hagen and Audrey Nguyen, MPR News

item.title: Supreme Court won’t hear Pennsylvania legislators' challenge to executive actions expanding voting access
item.description: The Supreme Court decided Monday it won’t take up a case to restore a lawsuit by Pennsylvania Republicans that challenged executive actions expanding voting access on the basis that only state legislatures can regulate federal elections.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, Fox 5

item.title: Major North Carolina newspaper knocks Trump over Helene response 'falsehoods'
item.description: A leading newspaper in North Carolina is blasting former President Donald Trump over what it calls his "falsehoods" about the government response to Hurricane Helene, which devastated large swaths of the state last week.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, Fox 5

item.title: Supreme Court won't hear arguments in Texas emergency abortion case
item.description: The Supreme Court decided not to hear arguments in a case involving Texas that could have provided an answer about whether a state abortion ban conflicts with a federal emergency care law.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Weixel, Fox 5

item.title: Trump urges his supporters to deliver victory in his return to scene of first assassination attempt
item.description: BUTLER, Pa. (AP) — Donald Trump returned on Saturday to the Pennsylvania fairgrounds where he was nearly assassinated in July, urging a large crowd to deliver an Election Day victory that he tied to his survival of the shooting.
item.dc:creator: JULIE CARR SMYTH, JILL COLVIN and ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON, Associated Press, Fox 5
